name: authenticator-clui-monorepo
description: Monorepo for authenticator-clui: CLI, desktop, and mobile clients sharing packages/core

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@authenticator/core && npm run vendor-core --workspace=authenticator-clui && npm run vendor-core --workspace=otpeer-authenticator
scripts.mobile: node -e "console.error('Mobile app is not in this repo yet'); process.exit(1)"

author: Sayed Tauseef Naqvi
